channel.title: SpotPulse Trending
channel.description: Live web pulse — India & Global intelligence dashboard.

item.title: US inflation jumps to 3.8% as energy costs surge from Iran war
item.description: The key measure of US inflation rises its highest level since May 2023 as consumers feel the impact of the Iran war.

item.title: Ransomware sector reconsolidating as Qilin, LockBit, and The Gentlemen expand influence in Q1 2026 - Industrial Cyber
item.description: Ransomware sector reconsolidating as Qilin, LockBit, and The Gentlemen expand influence in Q1 2026 Industrial Cyber

item.title: ‘Substantial’ gap between what FTAs promise and what regulations currently permit, CEA Nageswaran warns
item.description: The Chief Economic Advisor’s warning comes days after the EU’s Ambassador to India made similar statements about compliances not being used as trade barriers.

item.title: No Approval, No Take-Off: Maharashtra’s New Aircraft Rule For Ministers After PM Modi’s Call
item.description: Revenue Minister Chandrashekhar Bawankule said the Chief Minister has instructed that ministers cannot use aircraft without his prior approval.

item.title: NEET-UG 2026 cancelled LIVE: Process to hold re-exam to begin in 7-10 days: NTA DG Abhishek Singh
item.description: The cancellation of the NEET-UG 2026 examination, following an alleged question paper leak, has led to widespread political and student outrage across States

item.title: Uncertainty ends for workers in Noida; revised dues paid, says firm at centre of the labour unrest
item.description: Workers in the industrial area had staged a series of protests in April over issues such as wage hike, working hours and better overtime pay, with violence reported during one such stir on April 13

item.title: India delivers a ‘reputation’ rebuke to China over admission of helping Pakistan during Operation Sindoor
item.description: MEA spokesperson Randhir Jaiswal emphasised that the international community is closely watching how major powers align themselves.

item.title: Rs 16.77 lakh crore gone! Stock market crash over four days leaves investors with deep losses; what’s the - The Times of India
item.description: Rs 16.77 lakh crore gone! Stock market crash over four days leaves investors with deep losses; what’s the The Times of India

item.title: Hugging Face hosted malicious software masquerading as OpenAI release
item.description: A malicious Hugging Face repository that posed as an OpenAI release delivered infostealer malware to Windows machines and recorded about 244,000 downloads before removal, according to research from AI security firm HiddenLayer. The number of downloads may have been artificially inflated by the attackers to make the model seem more popular, so the extent of […] The post Hugging Face hosted malicious software masquerad

item.title: Canvas' parent company reaches agreement with hacking group behind recent breach
item.description: Instructure, the company behind the educational tool Canvas, has struck a deal with the hacking group ShinyHunters. This agreement secures stolen student and school data. ShinyHunters confirmed data deletion and no further targeting of Instructure customers for payment. The House Homeland Security Committee has also requested a briefing from Instructure regarding the intrusions.

item.title: MTAR Technologies Q4 Results: Profit soars over 200% to Rs 44 crore; revenue up 67%
item.description: MTAR Technologies reported a sharp rise in March-quarter earnings as strong revenue growth and improved operating efficiency boosted profitability. The precision engineering company benefited from higher product sales and expanding opportunities across clean energy, aerospace, defence, and strategic manufacturing sectors.

item.title: Iraqi Supertanker Pulls Back From US Hormuz Blockade
item.description: The Strait of Hormuz remains largely shuttered, with Iran-linked vessels dominating what little traffic is moving across the waterway. An Iraqi supertanker’s rare passage has come to a halt after a retreat from the US naval blockade line.

item.title: Free OnlyFans Lure Used to Spread Cross-Platform CRPx0 Malware
item.description: CRPx0 is a complex, stealthy malware campaign that targets macOS and Windows systems, and appears to have Linux capabilities in development. The post Free OnlyFans Lure Used to Spread Cross-Platform CRPx0 Malware appeared first on SecurityWeek .

item.title: Mumbai-based Sarvodaya Cooperative Bank licence cancelled by RBI: Key takeaways - Zee Business
item.description: Mumbai-based Sarvodaya Cooperative Bank licence cancelled by RBI: Key takeaways Zee Business

item.title: Here's the inflation breakdown for April 2026 — in one chart
item.description: The Iran war has pushed up gasoline, groceries and other prices for consumers.

item.title: Groww investors make bank; Mobikwik, Fractal's Q4 profits surge
item.description: Groww delivered 54–95x returns to early investors, who partially exited post lock-in. This and more in today's ETtech Top 5.

item.title: Spain reports new hantavirus case in passenger evacuated from cruise ship
item.description: The infected man is one of more than 120 passengers and crew members evacuated from MV Hondius, the ministry says.

item.title: Shunning the sunshine? NC order for Duke Energy to hit brakes on solar raises policy, legal questions. - Carolina Public Press
item.description: Shunning the sunshine? NC order for Duke Energy to hit brakes on solar raises policy, legal questions. Carolina Public Press

item.title: Army Foils Suspected Infiltration Attempt In Poonch's Mendhar Sector
item.description: Officials said the movement was suspected to be an attempt by a group of terrorists to infiltrate from across the border.

item.title: Instructure strikes deal with hackers who breached it twice
item.description: The maker of the Canvas school software said it "reached an agreement" with the hackers, but provided no guarantees that the hackers would not release the data or keep their word.

item.title: Waymo recalls robotaxis for driving on flooded roads
item.description: Waymo is recalling its autonomous driving software that allowed its vehicles to drive on flooded roads. The recall affects 3,791 vehicles that operate using Waymo's fifth and sixth generation systems. In documents filed with the National Highway Traffic Safety Administration, the Alphabet-owned company said that an unoccupied Waymo robotaxi "encountered an untraversable flooded section of […]

item.title: Indian Influencer In Dubai Wants To Quit Content Creation, Looks For A Corporate Job: "Not Stimulating"
item.description: Stanly stressed that her decision has nothing to do with money.

item.title: Deal Reached With Hackers to Delete Data Stolen From the Canvas Educational Platform
item.description: The company that operates online learning system Canvas said it struck a deal with hackers to delete the data they pilfered in a cyberattack that created chaos for students, many of them in the middle of finals. The post Deal Reached With Hackers to Delete Data Stolen From the Canvas Educational Platform appeared first on SecurityWeek .

item.title: Canvas owner reaches ‘agreement’ with hackers to secure stolen data
item.description: Instructure, the company behind the Canvas learning management platform, says it has "reached an agreement" with hackers that breached its systems last week to prevent stolen data from being leaked online. The ShinyHunters hacking group claimed responsibility for the attack before Canvas was briefly taken offline. The group threatened to publish 3.5 terabytes of student […]

item.title: Analysis: Iran war hangs over Trump's China trip — and his presidency
item.description: There is no quick fix to the economic and political damage from the war.

item.title: Uganda's president sworn in for record seventh term
item.description: Yoweri Museveni, 81, won disputed elections in January to extend his 40-year rule.

item.title: Tech Firm CGI Picks Tim Hurlebaus as CEO After AI Fears Crush Share Price
item.description: Shares of Canadian IT consulting firm CGI Inc. extended their losses over 40% in one year after it appointed a new chief executive officer, a slump largely due to concerns about disruption from artificial intelligence upstarts such as Anthropic PBC.

item.title: China’s Occupation Playbook for Taiwan Is Already Written - Small Wars Journal
item.description: China’s Occupation Playbook for Taiwan Is Already Written Small Wars Journal

item.title: Adani Ports Partners With Oceaneering To Expand Offshore Operations In Europe
item.description: The agreement is aimed at strengthening APSEZ's strategy to build one of the world's largest integrated marine platforms spanning logistics, offshore support, underwater engineering and deepwater infrastructure services.

item.title: Nearly Half of Companies Lose Up to 4% of Revenue Due to Supply Chain Disruption - The National Law Review
item.description: Nearly Half of Companies Lose Up to 4% of Revenue Due to Supply Chain Disruption The National Law Review

item.title: A secret Israeli base in Iraq? What we know
item.description: Israeli troops reportedly used this base to launch attacks against Iran during the war.

item.title: Retail inflation climbs to 13-month high of 3.5% in April on higher food, restaurant prices
item.description: Data on the Consumer Price Index (CPI) for April 2026 showed that inflation quickened from the 3.4% registered in March 2026, the first month following the start of the war in West Asia

item.title: Sebi proposes cash settlement for select agri derivatives to revive volumes
item.description: Sebi's proposal marks a significant policy shift for India’s agricultural derivatives market, where compulsory physical settlement has long been mandatory to ensure alignment between futures and spot prices and curb excessive speculation.

item.title: Report alleges Israel operated covert outpost in Iraq during war on Iran
item.description: According to The Wall Street Journal, Israel operated a military base in the Iraq during the US-Israeli war on Iran.

item.title: Google Says Hackers Used AI to Build Zero-Day Exploit - TechRepublic
item.description: Google Says Hackers Used AI to Build Zero-Day Exploit TechRepublic

item.title: West Pharmaceutical Services Hit by Disruptive Ransomware Attack
item.description: The company took systems offline globally after hackers exfiltrated data and deployed file-encrypting ransomware. The post West Pharmaceutical Services Hit by Disruptive Ransomware Attack appeared first on SecurityWeek .

item.title: India’s ‘China Reset’ Has No Answer to AVIC’s Pakistan Admission - The Diplomat – Asia-Pacific
item.description: India’s ‘China Reset’ Has No Answer to AVIC’s Pakistan Admission The Diplomat – Asia-Pacific

item.title: India revises GDP release calendar, annual and Q4 figures now due on June 7
item.description: India's National Statistics Office has revised the annual GDP data release schedule, moving it from the last working day of May to June 7 annually. This change, effective from FY26 data, aims to enhance the quality and robustness of national accounts. The first revised release will be on June 5, 2026, due to a weekend holiday.

item.title: US Inflation Driven Higher in April by Gasoline, Food
item.description: US inflation accelerated in April amid an ongoing climb in gasoline prices and a jump in the cost of groceries. The consumer price index rose 3.8% from a year earlier, the fastest pace since 2023, while the core CPI, which excludes food and energy, increased 0.4% from a month earlier and 2.8% from a year earlier. Michael McKee breaks down the numbers on Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

item.title: Petroleum Minister does not rule out fuel price hike amidst concerns about mounting OMCs’ losses
item.description: Speaking at the CII Annual Business Summit 2026, Petroleum Minister Hardeep Puri said India has 60 days of crude oil and LNG stock, and 45 days of rolling stock of LPG
